a:r.a:t: Every engagement starts at a different point. Every engagement moves forward.
Copilot and AI search used manually by engineers
RCAs drafted on request using AI prompts
Same structure, AI as a productivity layer
AI auto-classifies and routes every inbound ticket
RCAs auto-drafted and attached at ticket close
L2 engineer reviews and approves AI diagnosis
Smaller team, higher seniority per role
Full AI-led root cause with human sign-off
Lead-model: domain experts supported by AI
